basic_details.job_title: BRIC NABI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Scientist D, Assistant Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: BRIC National Agri Food and Biomanufacturing Institute (BRIC NABI)
basic_details.post_name: Scientist D, Assistant Engineer and More
basic_details.short_information: BRIC National Agri Food and Biomanufacturing Institute (BRIC NABI) Various Posts Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the BRIC NABI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 Years for All Posts. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD, M.E./M.Tech, Graduate + MBA, B.Tech/B.E., M.Sc., BVSc, B.Pharma
qualification.details: Scientist-D: PhD in Life Sciences / Agri-Biotech / Food & Nutrition / Food Technology or equivalent + 5 years experience OR M.E./M.Tech in Agri-Biotech / Biotech / Chemical Tech / Food Tech / Food Sciences & Nutrition or equivalent + 7 years experience. Senior Private Secretary: Graduate + MBA + 6 years experience in Level 6 or above in secretarial/admin work. Assistant Engineer (Civil): B.Tech/B.E./AMIE (Civil) + 3 years experience in civil works/infrastructure. Assistant Engineer (Electrical): B.Tech/B.E./AMIE (Electrical) + 3 years experience in electrical works/infrastructure. Senior Technical Assistant: BVSc / B.Tech / M.Sc / B.Pharma in Biotech / Food & Nutrition / Agri-Biotech / Instrumentation + 2 years experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BRIC NABI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BRIC NABI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BRIC NABI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the BRIC NABI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 01 June 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this BRIC NABI recruitment?
faq.answer: A total of 6 vacancies are available for various posts in the BRIC National Agri Food and Biomanufacturing Institute (BRIC NABI) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Scientist-D post?
faq.answer: For the Scientist-D post, a PhD in Life Sciences / Agri-Biotech / Food & Nutrition / Food Technology or equivalent with 5 years of experience is required. Alternatively, M.E./M.Tech with 7 years of experience is also accepted.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts advertised under this BRIC NABI recruitment is 50 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General category candidates ranges from Rs. 236/- to Rs. 590/-, as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for BRIC NABI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts typically involves a Written Test, followed by a Skill Test, and finally an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from outside Punjab apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification mentions the location as Mohali, Punjab. While specific domicile restrictions are not detailed here, candidates from all over India are generally encouraged to apply for government positions if they meet the eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Senior Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Senior Technical Assistant post is in the pay scale of Rs. 35,400 - Rs. 2,09,200 Per Month.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for Women candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee for Women candidates, which ranges from Rs. 118/- to Rs. 354/-, depending on the specific post and category details.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
